hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
p = d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path','') or d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','')
if 'src/bilbo/' in p or 'references/' in p or 'dashboard/' in p:
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput':{'hookEventName':'PostToolUse','additionalContext':'SYNC CHECK: You modified bilbo source. Before committing, verify these are up to date: (1) README.md — architecture diagram, file paths, CLI examples, design decisions (2) CLAUDE.md — layout, common commands, architecture pointers (3) report/scripts/lib/ — if detection methods or report metrics changed (4) deploy/docker-compose.yml — if a new env var or volume is needed (5) bilbo.api.* and bilbo/http/app.py — if a dashboard route changed shape'}}))
"
